rationale: ensureIndex creates wrong name when boolean key passed; internal index naming bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Connection pool not reused with Apache mpm_itk; Apache-specific connection behavior, no spec rule involved.
Remove PHP ini setting to prevent data corruption on 32-bit; API/platform change, not a spec deviation.
Driver throws exception on empty document insert; server accepts it. No specific spec rule about empty documents.
batchInsert ignores continueOnError flag only with MongoClient class; internal class-specific bug, pre-CRUD spec era.
Implementing new Batch Write API per DRIVERS-97; proactive feature implementation, not a nonconformance bug.
Splitting OP_INSERT batch on message size overflow; implementation feature, no spec rule directly contradicted.
New write operation method implementation per DRIVERS-97; proactive feature work, not a spec nonconformance.
Include maxWriteBatchSize and maxMessageSizeBytes in connection info; internal plumbing improvement, no spec violation.
Inline mapReduce command forced to primary despite secondary read preference; server-selection spec requires honoring read preference for eligible commands.
Read preference routing checks 'mapreduce' but spec canonical command name is 'mapReduce'; case mismatch causes wrong server selection.
JSON detection in config.m4 fails for PECL-installed JSON extension; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Build failure with old cyrus-sasl version; build/packaging compatibility issue, no spec deviation.
User attempting to decode a non-MongoDB BSON file; support question, not a driver spec violation for legitimate BSON.
User support question about inserting into large collection; resolved as user error, no spec violation.
GLE op checks only top-level write concern, ignoring MongoCollection's own write concern; write concern inheritance spec rule violated.
After setting w=majority on MongoClient, lowering write concern to w=1 on MongoDB doesn't take effect; write concern inheritance broken.
String write concerns not inherited by MongoDB/MongoCollection due to parsing bug; write concern propagation spec rule violated.
commandCursor doesn't auto-add cursor batchSize; usability bug in PHP-specific API, no specific spec rule about default batchSize in commandCursor.
JSON extension marked optional at build time but required at runtime; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Read preferences not respected with command cursors; server-selection spec requires honoring read preferences for all eligible operations.
Documentation update request to clarify fsync write concern flag behavior; docs improvement, not a driver code bug.
Deprecate static cursor properties MongoCursor::$timeout and $slaveOkay; API deprecation, no spec rule involved.
Include connection info in findAndModify exception messages; error message improvement, no spec violation.
Support maxTimeMS and exceptions in MongoCollection::group(); empty description, adding missing option support, not spec nonconformance.
maxTimeMS support overlooked on findOne() per spec and QA test plan (PHP-861); spec requirement missed in implementation.
Empty batch insert should throw exception per new server behavior; adapting to server behavior change, not a spec nonconformance.
Add $options array argument to MongoCollection::aggregate(); API improvement, adding missing option, consistent with shell helper.
allowDiskUse must be top-level field on aggregate command per spec; driver incorrectly always includes the field per DRIVERS-113.
Implement parallelCollectionScan command per DRIVERS-138; new feature implementation, not a nonconformance fix.
Use dropIndexes command instead of deprecated deleteIndexes; implementation update, no spec nonconformance.
Segfault in php_mongo_enforce_batch_size_on_command(); crash/memory bug in internal PHP code, no spec rule violated.
MongoCommandCursor Iterator interface incompatibility; PHP interface conformance issue, not MongoDB wire protocol spec.
Off-by-one in MongoCommandCursor::key() index; internal PHP cursor iteration bookkeeping bug, no spec rule about key() return value.
Segfault with NULL database name during SASL authentication; crash/memory bug in C code, no auth spec rule violated.
Command cursor doesn't throw exception when cursor expired; error-handling behavior for expired cursor, no spec rule specifically requiring exception.
aggregateCursor batch size defaults 101,101 instead of 101,0; PHP-specific cursor default behavior, no spec rule violated.
Segfault during shutdown after failover due to dead cursor not resetting cursor_id; crash/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
MongoCommandCursor->dead() returns wrong value after merge; test regression, internal state bug, no spec involvement.
Windows build broken with unresolved external symbols; build/packaging failure, no spec involvement.
MongoCursor rejects numeric field names due to legacy projection handling; PHP-specific API behavior bug, no spec rule about projection syntax.
Non-UTF8 exception thrown despite mongo.utf8=0 ini setting; PHP ini configuration bug, not a BSON spec violation.
MongoID ignores documented behavior of accepting invalid id strings; contradiction with documented API behavior, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Documentation bug: MongoClient constructor options missing from docs; docs-only fix, no driver behavior change.
updatedExisting always true even on upsert; spec requires updatedExisting to be false when document was inserted, not matched.
Spurious 'w property is read-only' deprecation when calling parent::__construct(); PHP class extension bug, no spec involvement.
Spurious '$id property is read-only' deprecation when extending MongoId; PHP class extension bug, no spec involvement.
Segfault querying large collection with cold working set due to timeout and socket close; crash/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
insufficient detail
Crash with free() invalid pointer in MongoCursor::hasNext; memory corruption bug, no spec rule violated.
